SectorAnalysis.description: Structured extraction for a single sector from the day's news.

entities.description: Named companies, organizations, or notable figures mentioned.
entities.title: Entities

sector.description: Sector name from the fixed taxonomy.
sector.title: Sector

sentiment.description: Overall market sentiment for this sector.
sentiment.title: Sentiment

news_category.description: Primary type of news event driving this sector.
news_category.title: News Category

extraction_status.description: 'ok' if full extraction succeeded; 'partial' if evidence was thin.
extraction_status.title: Extraction Status

SectorAnalysis.title: SectorAnalysis

schema.description: Analysis of all relevant sectors found in a single day's news feed.

sectors.description: List of ALL relevant sectors (1–8 max). Only include sectors with clear evidence in the news.
sectors.title: Sectors

schema.title: MultiSectorAnalysis

messages.content:
You are Ava, a sharp trader assistant. Analyze the FULL news feed and extract ALL relevant sectors.

RULES:
- Output ONLY valid JSON matching the schema provided.
- If no sector can be identified, return: {"sectors": []}
- Each sector must use a name from the enum exactly as written.
- Fill ALL required fields for each sector.
- No duplicate sectors. Maximum 8 sectors.
- No extra text outside JSON.

2026-05-14: Cerebras pops 68% in Nasdaq debut, pushing the AI chipmaker's market cap to $95 billion: Cerebras is taking advantage of a bull market for silicon, as the chipmaker becomes one of the most notable pureplay AI IPOs to date. . 2026-05-14: Xi warns Trump: Mishandling Taiwan will put U.S.-China relationship in 'great jeopardy': President Donald Trump met Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing on Thursday morning for the start of a high-stakes summit that runs through Friday.. 2026-05-14: China will order 200 Boeing jets, Trump tells Fox News: President Donald Trump told Fox News that China has agreed to buy 200 Boeing jets, according to a clip that aired Thursday.. 2026-05-14: Ford surges nearly 20% in two days. It might be an AI 'meme' stock after energy pivot: Ford Motor shares have been on a tear the past couple days, rising on buzz over its ties to the energy storage market.. 2026-05-14: These stocks screener shows. . 2026-05-14: Dems demand Lutnick resign over Epstein interview: 'You lied': The White House said in February that President Donald Trump, who has also faced scrutiny over his relationship to Epstein, continues to stand behind Lutnick.. 2026-05-14: Bond market believes Fed behind the curve on inflation as Warsh takes over: Bond traders are hoping that the central bank's easing bias is replaced with a skewed view toward tightening.. 2026-05-14: Fed Governor Miran submits resignation, throws support behind Warsh as new chair: Miran served as a contrarian voice on the rate-setting Federal Open Market Committee. . 2026-05-14: Kash Patel appeals dismissal of defamation lawsuit against ex-FBI official Figliuzzi: Kash Patel, the FBI director, is separately suing The Atlantic for allegedly defaming him with an article that said he has abused alcohol.. 2026-05-14: CDC says there are no U.S. hantavirus cases currently, 41 people being monitored: The CDC said the risk to the general public from hantavirus remains low.. 2026-05-14: Bessent sees 'substantial disinflation' ahead as Warsh takes over the Fed: Bessent said the energy-fed inflation surge recently is likely to reverse as the U.S. is \going to keep pumping.\"". 2026-05-14: Chinese parts are already in U.S. cars as lawmakers warn Trump against China auto deal: Trump-Xi talks spark bipartisan warnings over Chinese automakers, U.S. auto jobs, connected vehicles and China’s growing role in the supply chain.. 2026-05-14: Bolster your portfolio for hot inflation with these ETFs, Bank of America says: Corners of the market are poised to hold up in an an inflationary environment, the bank found.. 2026-05-14: Crypto industry scores win as Clarity Act regulation bill clears Senate hurdle: The Senate Banking Committee advanced a rules-of-the-road crypto bill known as the Clarity Act by a vote of 15-9.. 2026-05-14: Nearly 40% chances of stagflation by end of 2026, traders say : Traders are not optimistic about the state of economy by the end of this year, placing high chances of stagflation, a mix of high inflation and unemployment.. 2026-05-14: U.S. Border Patrol Chief Mike Banks resigns: Controversy over enforcement actions by Border Patrol and ICE led to a partial shutdown of DHS from February to late April.. 2026-05-14: Some short sellers are seeing opportunity in this tech mania. His letter moved the prediction market: In the letter, Dana White said that the cap is already starting to create problems for the gambling industry. . 2026-05-14: China will work behind the scenes to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz, Bessent says : President Trump held talks with President Xi during a two-day summit in Beijing on Thursday.. 2026-05-14: A Starbucks upgrade tackles a thorny issue pushed by the stock's skeptics: TD Cowen is optimistic that Starbucks is on its way to mounting a successful turnaround, but execution is key.. 2026-05-14: Living paycheck to paycheck? These budgeting apps can help you stay ahead of your spending: Budgeting apps provide good insight into your spending habits and where you could free up some cash.. 2026-05-14: Musk's China trip during OpenAI trial prompts apology from his lawyer for CEO's absence: Musk sued his OpenAI co-founders Sam Altman and Greg Brockman, alleging they had violated a promise to keep their company a nonprofit.. 2026-05-14: Goldman says tech stock 'up crash' is sign of even more gains to come: Stocks are rallying so fast it's creating a volatility dynamic that's only been seen four times in history.. 2026-05-14: These three artworks could sell for $100 million each next week as May auctions begin: The wild card for the May auctions is the Middle East, with the Iran war clouding buyer expectations. . 2026-05-14: Retail investors have a new 'toy' for speculation, Barclays says : Barclays analysts said predictions markets are seeing trading volume that rivals other speculative investments popular with retail traders. . 2026-05-14: This generator stock essential to AI is set up well for the near and long term, charts show: Jay Woods of Freedom Capital Markets breaks down the technicals on this generator stock.. 2026-05-14: Trump-Xi summit could hinge on these two crucial tech flashpoints: Access to the world's second largest economy for U.S. tech companies and talks on critical minerals could be key points of discussion.. 2026-05-14: Cisco CEO says tech is entering a 'networking supercycle' as stock pops 13% on strong AI demand: Shares headed for their best day in more than two decades after Cisco blew past its AI infrastructure and hyperscaler orders guidance for the fiscal year . 2026-05-14: Americans still feel pessimistic about the economy. Streeting resigns: The prime minister's colleagues could be ready to mutiny, with leadership bids potentially being announced Thursday.. 2026-05-14: U.S., EU lawmakers pledge European scrutiny of Paramount's WBD deal: The lawmakers, in a letter reported first by CNBC, told Paramount CEO David Ellison that the Warner Brothers Discovery acquisition would stifle competition.. 2026-05-14: Cuba says oil and diesel supplies have run dry under U.S. sanctions: A Cuban official said the situation is “extremely tense” as blackouts sparked protests in Havana on Wednesday. . 2026-05-14: Polestar CEO tells CNBC ‘pump anxiety’ has made EVs ‘all about money’: The EV maker is seeing an increased demand for both used and new cars as fuel prices have gone up following the disruption at the Strait of Hormuz.. 2026-05-14: Goldman Sachs warns UK T-bills are no 'magic bullet' for UK fiscal woes as borrowing costs surge: The U.K. government could look to issue more shorter-dated debt in a bid to ease its overall funding costs.. 2026-05-14: Versant stock jumps 10% after company's Q1 report shows bright spots in licensing, platforms: Versant, the portfolio of TV networks spun out from Comcast, reported earnings for its first quarter as an independent company. . 2026-05-14: Iran war fallout forces Singapore Airlines-backed Air India to cancel 27% of international flights: Air India, a carrier co-owned by Tata Group and Singapore Airlines, plans to scale back over a quarter of its international flights from June as rising costs bite.. 2026-05-14: UK grows 0.6% in the first quarter — before the Iran war really started to hit global economy: The data will provide a ray of comfort for the Labour government, which is under pressure.. 2026-05-14: Retail investors have led this incredible market comeback. Goldman pinpointed their favorite stocks: Individual investors are back as a major force in the market after sticking to the sidelines since the start of the U.S.-Iran war. . 2026-05-14: Hantavirus outbreak isn't another Covid pandemic – but experts say it's testing U.S. readiness: For some experts, the outbreak is raising broader concerns about how equipped the U.S. is to respond to future infectious disease threats.. 2026-05-14: Trade wars to extended truce: Analysts expect ‘stabilization’ in U.S.-China ties as Trump-Xi meet: The world's two largest economies sought to stabilize fractured ties at their first high-level meeting in nearly a decade.. 2026-05-14: Lotus CEO warns solid-state batteries still up to a decade from mass production: Sometimes billed as the \holy grail\" of sustainable driving, solid-state batteries have long been stuck between theory and the promise of commercialization.". 2026-05-14: Cerebras prices IPO above expected range, as Wall Street braces for AI tsunami: Cerebras raised $5.55 billion in its IPO, and with the chipmaker's offering, investors are gearing up for some even bigger AI deals later this year. . 2026-05-14: CNBC Daily Open: Trump touches down in Beijing as U.S. inflation heats up: Asia markets were mixed ahead of the highly anticipated Trump-Xi talks. . 2026-05-14: Asia-Pacific stocks trade mixed as Trump lands in Beijing for high-stakes Xi meeting: Asia markets traded mixed ahead of closely watched Trump-Xi summit on trade, tariffs and technology restrictions.
